source_files.pdf: Generated `specs.md` from official manufacturer URLs previously stored in `pdf.txt`
source_files.finance: Generated from official Ford pricing and finance support pages

finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: Ford.com lists a starting MSRP of $37,795 before destination/delivery, taxes, title, registration, and dealer fees.
finance_snapshot.apr: Ford support disclosures say special APR offers require Ford Credit financing and not all buyers qualify; current rates vary by model, ZIP code, and credit profile.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Use Ford Credit and the Ford payment calculator for location-specific estimates.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by lender approval, trim, incentives, and customer structure.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Use Ford's payment calculator or dealer quote for current lease estimates.
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Varies by dealer, taxes, fees, and any available incentives.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Ford notes that available offers and incentives can vary and should be confirmed with a local dealer.
finance_snapshot.warranty: See Ford Owner?s Manual & Warranty resources for the current model-year warranty guide and exact model-specific coverage.
finance_snapshot.best_for: EV shoppers who want mainstream-brand support and a sporty design.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: All-electric operation changes fuel-cost math and can improve daily running-cost predictability.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Charging setup, insurance, and EV incentive eligibility can materially affect the real monthly picture.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Ford.com public pricing and Ford support finance disclosures on March 26, 2026.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle. Source image alt: 2026 Ford Mustang Mach-E with Sport Appearance Package
